task_completion.description: The agent successfully identified and navigated to the correct target issue.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Redmine issue page with the subject 'Implement centralized log aggregation with OpenSearch'.

task_completion.description: The target issue was reassigned to one of the least-loaded developers (Bob Walker or Grace Lee).
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Assignee' field on the issue page displays either 'Bob Walker' or 'Grace Lee', or the issue history/journal shows a change of assignee from 'Carol Santos' to 'Bob Walker' or 'Grace Lee'.

task_completion.description: A specific comment explaining the workload rebalancing was added to the issue.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The issue history or notes section contains the exact text: 'Workload rebalancing: reassigned to reduce team burnout. Previous assignee was over capacity.'

task_completion.description: 0.5 hours of 'Design' activity was logged with the specified comment.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Spent time' section shows an entry for 0.50 hours, or the issue history shows time logged with the Activity set to 'Design' and the comment 'Sprint planning: workload rebalancing session.'

task_completion.description: The estimated hours for the issue were increased by 2.0 hours.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Estimated hours' field on the issue page displays '62.00', or the issue history shows the estimated hours changing from 60.0 to 62.0.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the Redmine web interface to perform the tasks.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser navigating the Redmine GUI, clicking edit buttons, and filling out web forms, rather than using terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: Time was logged using the proper Redmine time-tracking feature, not just written as plain text in a comment.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent using the 'Log time' form or the 'Spent time' field updating in the issue metadata, rather than just typing '0.5 hours' into the main issue description or a standard note.

integrity.description: The changes were genuinely submitted and saved to the Redmine backend.
integrity.visual_evidence: The final screenshots show the issue page in a read-only view with the updated metadata (Assignee, Estimated hours) and a new entry in the 'History' section, proving the form was actually submitted and not just modified via frontend DOM manipulation.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The correct target issue is 'Implement centralized log aggregation with OpenSearch' (this was Carol Santos's only 'New' issue). The correct new assignee must be either 'Bob Walker' or 'Grace Lee'. The final estimated hours must be exactly 62.0 (the original value was 60.0, plus the required 2.0 hours). The logged time must be exactly 0.5 hours under the 'Design' activity.
